zh: 在 3 类有源植入式医疗器械生产线获得实践经验，支持 NCR 工程评估，协助工艺工程团队改进制造工艺。
通过识别问题并提出原因假设和可能的解决方案，参与 QMS 持续改进活动。
en: Gained hands-on experience in Class 3 Active Implantable Medical Devices production line. Supported NCR engineering evaluation and assisted process engineering team.
Participated in QMS Continuous Improvement Activities by identifying issues and proposing hypotheses of causes and possible solutions.

zh: 管理轮滑和球拍运动主车间，亲自和电话处理客户咨询，扩展车间容量。
通过改进的标签和存储系统，将平均周转时间从一周缩短至三天。
en: Managed flagship workshop for wheel sports and racket sports. Addressed customer enquiries in person and via phone.
Reduced average turnaround time from one week to three days by implementing improved labelling and storage system.

zh: 精确诊断和修复机械/技术自行车问题，执行日常维护确保最佳性能。
向客户宣传自行车护理、维护最佳实践，推广商店服务、升级和配件。
监督库存控制，与供应商协调及时补货，在快节奏环境中高效协作。
en: Diagnose and repair mechanical and technical bike issues with precision. Perform routine servicing for optimal bike performance.
Educate customers on bike care, maintenance best practices, and product features. Promote shop services and accessories.
Oversee inventory control, coordinate with suppliers for timely restocking. Collaborate efficiently in fast-paced environment.

zh: 与大学和行业合作伙伴组成多学科团队，设计将退役火车车厢改造为紧急灾难避难所的创新方案。
使用多层材料设计紧凑隔热机械系统（优化空间和成本），开发支持六名住户日常能源需求的太阳能电力系统。
交付满足移动性、可持续性和紧急准备关键要求的全尺寸原型。
en: Collaborated in multidisciplinary team to design innovative solution repurposing decommissioned train carriages into emergency disaster shelters.
Designed compact thermally insulated mechanical system using multi-layer materials (optimised space and cost), developed solar-powered electrical system for six occupants.
Delivered full-scale prototype meeting key requirements for mobility, sustainability, and emergency readiness.

zh: 在前三个月内牵头高海拔实验室的市场研究和上市策略，翻译和完善用户问卷以实现精确市场分析。
对 30+ 位 KOL（临床医生、外科医生、医院科室主任）进行深入访谈，评估市场需求和期望。
开发数据驱动的营销策略，优化医疗器械产品的定位和商业化。
en: Spearheaded market research and launch strategy for High Altitude Laboratory within first three months. Translated and refined user questionnaires for precise market analysis.
Conducted in-depth interviews with 30+ KOLs (clinicians, surgeons, hospital department heads) to assess market needs.
Developed data-driven marketing strategies to optimise product positioning and commercialization for medical laboratory equipment.

zh: 组织执行以 HCP 为重点的推广活动（如演讲者项目、CME），推动治疗/医疗器械的品牌认知度。
管理促销材料端到端生产，确保符合监管指南并与供应商协调及时交付。
通过系统市场监测和 KOL 参与进行竞争情报，为商业策略提供信息。
en: Organised and executed HCP-focused promotional events (speaker programs, CMEs) to drive brand awareness and adoption.
Managed end-to-end production of promotional materials, ensuring regulatory compliance while coordinating vendor delivery.
Conducted competitive intelligence through systematic market surveillance and KOL engagements to inform commercial strategy.

zh: 管理监管提交文书，确保公司产品符合中国市场准入要求。
en: Managed regulatory submission paperwork to ensure company products complied with Chinese market entry requirements.

zh: 在快节奏环境中提供大量客户服务，管理运营并组织促销活动。
en: Provided high-volume customer service in fast-paced environment, managing operations and organising promotional events.
